scope: finite, effectively constructible and effectively usable representation systems with fully inventoried support machinery

admissibility_criteria.statement: the complete representation package has a finite public description
the representation package can be constructed by an effective procedure
all registered uses of the package are performed by effective procedures
every decoder, interpreter, scheduler, query interface, codebook, external store, oracle claim, and proof object required for use is inventoried
the interface is total over the registered query domain or explicitly returns a distinguished failure or Unknown result
identity conditions for represented objects and support artifacts are stable across executions

permitted_variation: graph, relational, functional, symbolic, or hybrid surface form
exclusions: oracle use without an effective realization
interfaces that silently omit registered cases
representations whose identity conditions change between equivalent runs

three_valued_rule.inadmissible: at least one criterion is false
three_valued_rule.unknown: none false and at least one unresolved
